zh.lifeSummary: Sir William de Giffard II是William Giffard和Mrs William Giffard的兒子，於1250年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特吉福德。他於大約1272年與Lady Alice Ribemont結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年12月5日在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William de Giffard II was born in 1250, in Gifford, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of William Giffard and Mrs William Giffard. He married Lady Alice Ribemont about 1272. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 5 December 1329, in Exeter, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Exeter, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Giffard II(은)는 1250년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 지퍼드에서 William Giffard(와)과 Mrs William Giffard의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1272년 Lady Alice Ribemont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 12월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터에 묻혔다.
